lines.english: Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Meditating in remembrance on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all anxiety is removed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad raakh man maeh |
lines.english: Keep the Word of the Guru's Shabad in your mind.
Without the Lord God, there is no one else at all.
Meditate on Him and cross over the ocean of fire. ||2||
He alone preserves and destroys. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਰਿਦੈ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan ridai ur dhaar |
lines.english: Enshrine the Guru's Feet in your heart.
Focus your meditation on the Guru's Sublime Form.
Renouncing everything, I have come to the Guru's Sanctuary.
Here and hereafter, you shall be honored. ||3||
My anxieties are over - O Nanak, I have found peace. ||4||61||130||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Remembering Him in meditation, all pains are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jap man mere govind kee baanee |
lines.english: O my mind, chant the Bani, the Hymns of the Lord of the Universe.
The jewel of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell in the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਸਨ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo jan raam rasan vakhaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Holy People chant the Lord's Name with their tongues. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa kee drisatt sadaa sukh hoe |2|
lines.english: By His Glance of Grace, eternal peace is obtained. ||2||
Without the One Lord, there is no other at all.
Make the One Lord your friend, intimate and companion.
The Lord Master is totally pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਖਰ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਲੇਖੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har akhar man meh lekh |3|
lines.english: Write in your mind the Word of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||
Nanak sings the Praises of the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. ||4||62||131||
The whole world is engrossed in fear.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis bhau naahee jis naam adhaaraa |1|
lines.english: Those who have the Naam, the Name of the Lord, as their Support, feel no fear. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai soee karanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You do whatever You please. ||1||Pause||
Fear does not affect those who take to Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin sukh paaeaa jo prabh bhaanaa |2|
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to God, find peace. ||2||
In pleasure and in pain, the world is coming and going in reincarnation.
Maya pervades the awesome ocean of fire.
Please preserve me, O God, O Great Preserver!
Those who have found the True Guru are calm and cool. ||3||
By Your Grace, I chant Your Name.
Says Nanak, what a helpless creature I am! ||4||63||132||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
By Your Grace, I obtain a seat in Your Court. ||1||
Without You, O Supreme Lord God, there is no one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tumaree kripaa te sadaa sukh hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Your Grace, everlasting peace is obtained. ||1||Pause||
O Supreme Lord God, Infinite Lord and Master,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੇ ਤਉ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tum man vase tau dookh na laagai |
lines.english: If You abide in the mind, we do not suffer in sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tumaree kripaa te bhram bhau bhaagai |2|
lines.english: By Your Grace, doubt and fear run away. ||2||
O Nanak, may I be blessed with the treasure of the True Name. ||4||64||133||
I offer this prayer to the True Guru:
You are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of all hearts. ||3||
so is the mouth empty without the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
As the husk is empty without the grain,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਦੇਹ ਬਿਗਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam bihoon dhrig deh bigaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, cursed is the body, which shall be taken back by Death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japahu nit praanee |
lines.english: O mortal, chant continually the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.
Without the Husband, where is the marriage? ||2||
Without the Naam, no one's face shows good fortune.
Forgetting the Naam, and attached to other tastes,
O God, grant Your Grace, and give me this gift.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਆਸ ਨ ਪੂਜੈ ਕਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa kee aas na poojai kaae |3|
lines.english: no desires are fulfilled. ||3||
Please, let Nanak chant Your Name, day and night. ||4||65||134||
